name: Storage Caddy Blue - Brightroom™
description:
Effortlessly keep small essentials in order with the help of this Blue Storage Caddy from Brightroom™. Designed in a solid blue hue, this plastic storage caddy features a sectional design with one large and three small sections for convenient storage. Great for storing craft supplies, collectibles, small souvenirs and more, it comes with a handle on top for easy carrying.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.

Overall Width: 10.6 inches
Overall Height: 6.2 inches
Overall Depth: 6.6 inches
Height of Caddy: 3.1 inches
